label: FAIL
rationale: Target Set returns SUCCESS while modifying SPInfo column 0x00 (UID). Core SPInfo defines column 0x00 as UID, and section 5.3.2.1.1 says this column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host; Opal preconfigures the SPInfo row at UID 0000000200000001.

label: FAIL
